sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85129" key="poluolve/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-ολϝέω</orth>, <sense id="n85129.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be rich in wine,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Merc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
